# awsext_appintegrations_application (Resource)

Creates and manages an Amazon AppIntegrations Application (appintegrations:CreateApplication / GetApplication / UpdateApplication / DeleteApplication). Used to register AgentCore gateway MCP servers as Connect workspace applications.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "awsext_appintegrations_application" "gateway" {
  name             = "bc-sonic-addservice-gateway"
  namespace        = "bc-sonic-addservice-api-emyj-nmpnce5jah"
  application_type = "MCP_SERVER"

  application_source_config = {
    external_url_config = {
      access_url = "https://bc-sonic-addservice-api-emyj-nmpnce5jah.gateway.bedrock-agentcore.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/mcp"
    }
  }

  tags = {
    env = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `application_source_config` (Attributes) Configuration for where the application should be loaded from. Forces replacement. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--application_source_config))
- `name` (String) The name of the application. Updatable in place.
- `namespace` (String) The namespace of the application. Must match the AgentCore gateway ID. Forces replacement.

### Optional

- `application_type` (String) The type of application. Use `MCP_SERVER` for AgentCore gateway integrations. Forces replacement.
- `description` (String) Description of the application. Updatable in place.
- `iframe_config` (Attributes) Iframe configuration for the application. Updatable in place. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--iframe_config))
- `initialization_timeout` (Number) Maximum time in milliseconds allowed to establish a connection with the workspace. Updatable in place.
- `permissions` (List of String) Configuration of events or requests that the application has access to. Updatable in place.
- `publications` (Attributes List) Events that the application publishes. Forces replacement. Deprecated by AWS in favor of permissions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--publications))
- `subscriptions` (Attributes List) Events that the application subscribes to. Forces replacement. Deprecated by AWS in favor of permissions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--subscriptions))
- `tags` (Map of String) Tags to assign to the application.

### Read-Only

- `application_arn` (String) Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Application.
- `application_id` (String) Service-assigned unique identifier for the Application.

<a id="nestedatt--application_source_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `application_source_config`

Required:

- `external_url_config` (Attributes) External URL configuration for the application. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--application_source_config--external_url_config))

<a id="nestedatt--application_source_config--external_url_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `application_source_config.external_url_config`

Required:

- `access_url` (String) The URL used to access the application.

Optional:

- `approved_origins` (List of String) Additional approved origin URLs for the application.



<a id="nestedatt--iframe_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `iframe_config`

Optional:

- `allow` (List of String) List of features allowed in the iframe.
- `sandbox` (List of String) List of sandbox attributes for the iframe.


<a id="nestedatt--publications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `publications`

Required:

- `event` (String) The name of the publication event.
- `schema` (String) The JSON schema of the publication event.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Description of the publication.


<a id="nestedatt--subscriptions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `subscriptions`

Required:

- `event` (String) The name of the subscription event.

Optional:

- `description` (String) Description of the subscription.
